verses.text: Keima mite' thungetna a pia dingin a baihsa-in kei om napi-in, amaute in hong ngenlo uh hi. Amaute' muh dingin kei om napi-in, amaute in hong zong beeklo uh hi. Minamte tungah, “Hih lai-ah om ing, hih lai-ah om ing,” ci-in a dawng pah dingin kiging napi-in, amaute in kei tungah thu hong ngenlo uh hi
A hoihloin gamta-in, amau' deih bang a zui teitei mite
ka maitangah a tawntungin kei hong hehsak denin, biakna huan sungah biakpiakna bawlin dawibiakna tau tungah paknamtui a hal mite
han sungah tu-in, mun simthamah zanin misite thu a dong mite, voksa ne-in amau' beel sungah dawibiakna sa mehtui a koih mite

“Note kiang panin kote hong kituamkoih ahih manin kihemkhia un la, ko kiangah hong pai kei un,” ci-in midangte tungah a gen mite — hih bang mite khempeuh a sang dingin a beisa hun sungah ka kiging tawntung hi. Hih bang mite ka thuakzo nawn kei hi. Amaute tungah ka hehna pen a mit ngeilo meikuang tawh kibang hi

Tu-in amaute gimpiak ding ka khentat khin a, amaute' thuak dingte lai sungah kiciamteh khin hi. Amau' mawhnate ka mawk koih kei ding a, amau' mawhna leh a pu a pate uh mawhnate ka thukkik ding hi. Amaute in mual liante tungah paknamtui halin, mual neute tungah hong simmawh uh ahih manin amau' gamtatna tawh kizui-in ka thuk ding hi, ci hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Leenggahzu pen leenggah bom panin kingah a, mite in, ‘Tuate kimang thei ding ahih ciangin susia kei un,’ a cih mah bangun kei zong a minam bupun susia loin, keima na hong semte ka suaktasak ding hi
Jakob sung panin Judah minamte thupha ka pia ding a, amau' suanlekhakte in mualtung gam a luah ding uh hi. Keima na hong sem, keima teel mite, tua gamah teng ding uh hi
Amaute in kei hong bia ding uh a, Sharon gam pen amau' tuuhon gamtatna mun suaksak ding uh a, Akhor Kuam pen amau' bawng honte' lupna mun a suaksak ding uh hi
“Ahih hangin kei a hong nusia, ka mual siangtho a mangngilh, Gad pasian-a' dingin sabuai phahin, Meni pasian-a' dingin zu helsa hai sungah a dim note pen

namsau tawh a si dingin ka hong seh ding a, hong that dingte' mai-ah na ngawng uh na dawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kong sap ciangin note in nong dawng kei uh a, thu ka gen ciangin nong ngai kei uh hi. Keima thu man'loh ding mah na utzaw uh a, a sia na gamta uh hi

Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: En un, ka nasemte in ne ding uh a, ahih hangin note na gilkial ding uh hi. Ka nasemte in dawn ding uh a, ahih hangin note na dangtak ding uh hi. Ka nasemte lungdam ding uh a, ahih hangin note na maizum ding uh hi
Ka nasemte in lungdamin la sa ding uh a, note in lungsim na sa-in kiko-in, lungsim gimna hangin na tau ding uh hi
Keima teel mite in ciamsiatna-in na min uh zang ding uh a, Topa Pasian in note hong that ding hi. Ahih hangin ama nasemte pen min dang a phuah ding hi

Leitungah thupha a kipiak ding a ngenpa in thuman Pasian min tawh thupha a kipiak ding ngen ding a, leitungah thuciamna a lapa in thuman Pasian min tawh a ciam ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a beisa huna haksatnate khempeuh kimangngilh khinta a, tuate beimang khinta hi.
“Tu-in vantung thakte leh leitung thak ka piangsak hi. A beisa thute kiciamteh nawnlo ding a, kiphawkkha nawnlo ding hi
Keima pian'saksa sungah lungdamin kipakin om tawntung un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khuapi lungdamna khua-in bawlin, a mite a lungnuam dingin ka bawl hi
Jerusalem' hangin ka lungdam ding a, ka mite' hangin ka kipak ding hi. Tua khuasungah kahna aw leh cimawhin kikona aw om nawnlo ding hi
Naupangte a ngeksih omlo ding a, sauveipipi kinungta ding hi. Kum za bek a nungtate a khan'sihin kingaihsun ding a, kum za cingloin a site, keima gimpiakna lim hi ding hi
Amaute in inn lam ding uh a, a sungah teng ding uh hi. Amaute in leenggui lo bawl ding uh a, a gah ne ding uh hi

Amaute in inn lam ding uh a, tua inn-ah midang teng, cih om nawnlo ding hi. Amaute in leenggui suanin adang khat in ne, cih omlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima mite' nuntak hun pen singkung khat nuntak tan bang sawt ding a, keima teel mite in amau' khut tawh a sepsa nate lungdamin nesuak ding uh hi

Amaute in a mawkna dingin na semlo ding uh a, lungkhamna dingin ta neilo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Topa' thupha piak, suanlekhakte hi ding uh a, amau' tate amaute tawh nungta khawm ding uh hi
Amaute in hong sap ma-in ke'n ka dawng ding a, amaute in thu a gen laitakin ke'n ka za ding hi

Keivom leh tuuno in an nekhawm ding uh a, humpinelkai in bawngtal bangin buhkung ne ding hi. Leivui pen gulpi' an hita ding a, mite hong tu nawnlo ding hi. Keima mual siangtho tung tengah amaute kiliamsaklo ding uh a, kisusialo ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi.
